seoTitle: Pelham vs Pelican Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pelham and Pelican Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pelham vs Pelican Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pelham and Pelican Creek.
heading: Pelham vs Pelican Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelham, Queensland and Pelican Creek, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Pelham (28/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelham or Pelican Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelham has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Pelican Creek scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelham scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Pelican Creek scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelham or Pelican Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
